permissions.comment: Git safety for team work (DECISIONS-BASELINE §0023). ALLOW: push feature/bugfix/hotfix branches + open PRs to develop (owner's standing authorization) — the normal end of a slice; LOCAL merge of feature/* sub-branches into the slice branch (architect integrates parallel dev work — never while on develop/main); gh read operations (authenticated CLI) for briefings and CI analysis. ASK: create a git tag (only on the owner's explicit request; never automatic). DENY: PR merge, release publish, force-push — protected branches change only via reviewed PR; the server-side branch protection is the real enforcement.
